macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Markets Plunge on Monday February 23
items.summary: Dow 30 dropped 821.91 points or 1.66% to 48,804.06, S&P 500 fell 71.76 points or 1.04% to 6,837.75, and Nasdaq declined 1.13% amid a broad sell-off.

items.title: Wall Street Sell-Off Drives Major Indices Lower
items.summary: DJIA weakened 1.66%, S&P 500 lost 1.04%, and Nasdaq shed 1.13% on February 23 due to selling pressure across the market.

items.title: Key US Economic Data Due on February 24 Including Consumer Confidence
items.summary: Traders await Conference Board Consumer Confidence, ADP Employment Change, S&P/CS House Price Index, House Price Index, Redbook sales, 2-Year Note Auction, and API Crude Stocks, alongside Fed speeches.

items.title: Polymarket Odds Favor S&P 500 Up Day on February 24
items.summary: Prediction market shows 68% chance of S&P 500 closing higher than prior trading day on February 24, 2026.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Struggles at $64,000 Support Level Amid Market Volatility
items.summary: Bitcoin price stands at $64,120.07, down 7.02% over the past week, as the cryptocurrency tests a critical support level from mid-2024. Trading volume has surged 58.37% to $44.55B, with institutional buy walls forming below the $64k mark.

items.title: Ethereum and Altcoins See Increased Trading Activity Amid Market Uncertainty
items.summary: Ethereum volume jumped 54.78% to $20.78B as traders monitor for a potential price floor, while Solana and Cardano also experienced significant volume increases of 57.09% and 13.48% respectively.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits Record Oversold Levels Against Gold
items.summary: The BTC/XAU ratio declined 7.52% week-to-date and over 70% from its December 2025 high, marking the most oversold Bitcoin has been relative to gold on record.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: FSU Hosts 2026 AI and Machine Learning Expo Focused on Agentic AI
items.summary: Florida State University will host AIMLX26 on February 27-28, bringing together experts to explore agentic AI—autonomous systems that perform tasks with minimal human intervention—across medicine, finance, and education. OpenAI's Sherwin Wu will deliver the keynote address on industry trends since ChatGPT's 2022 launch.

items.title: Anthropic Reveals Chinese AI Firms Conducted Large-Scale Model Distillation Attacks
items.summary: Anthropic disclosed that DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, and MiniMax used 16 million fraudulent queries across 24,000 fake accounts to illegally extract Claude's capabilities. The attacks targeted reasoning, coding, and agentic reasoning features, raising national security concerns about unprotected AI models.

items.title: Study: AI Can Transform Healthcare Only With System-Wide Redesign
items.summary: A Fraser Institute study by University of Toronto researcher Avi Goldfarb concludes that AI adoption in healthcare could deliver enormous productivity gains, faster diagnosis, and lower costs—but only if health-care systems are fundamentally redesigned with AI at their core rather than simply inserting AI tools into existing workflows.

items.title: UAE Central Bank Issues AI Guidelines for Financial Institutions
items.summary: The UAE Central Bank released new guidelines requiring licensed financial institutions to adopt documented governance frameworks for AI and machine learning adoption. The UAE is also partnering with the US to develop an AI campus with 5 gigawatts of data center capacity in Abu Dhabi.

items.title: India Launches SAHI Framework and BODH Platform for Healthcare AI
items.summary: India introduced SAHI, a strategy framework for artificial intelligence in health that categorizes data gaps blocking AI use cases, alongside BODH—a benchmarking platform developed by IIT Kanpur allowing innovators to train healthcare AI models against anonymized real-world health data.

items.title: Federal Reserve: AI Productivity Gains Remain Limited Despite Business Adoption
items.summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco reports that while businesses across the West are investing in AI for consumer research, operations, and product development, macro-studies find limited evidence of significant AI-driven productivity growth, with most firms reporting little evidence of transformative gains.
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: ARC Raiders Shrouded Sky Update Launches Today
items.summary: Embark Studios releases the Shrouded Sky update for ARC Raiders on February 24, 2026, introducing a new Hurricane map condition, Firefly and Comet enemy types, expanded progression systems, and new expedition opportunities, free for all players.[3]

items.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator Joins Xbox Game Pass Today
items.summary: TCG Card Shop Simulator arrives on Xbox Game Pass for Series X|S, PC, and Cloud on February 24, 2026, as part of this week's additions alongside two other titles through February 26.[4]

items.title: Rise of Piracy Enters Early Access on PC
items.summary: Rise of Piracy, a real-time action, adventure, and strategy game set in the high seas, launches in early access on PC today, February 24, 2026.[6]

items.title: New Xbox Sales Live with Major Discounts
items.summary: Xbox's February 24, 2026 sale roundup offers big discounts on titles like Atomic Heart, Dead Island 2, Saints Row IV: Re-Elected, and Metro Exodus.[5]

items.title: Nintendo Treehouse Live Scheduled for Today
items.summary: Nintendo announces a Treehouse: Live event on February 24, 2026, at 2 PM PT, featuring gameplay demos of Super Mario Bros. Wonder Nintendo Switch 2 Edition and Pokémon Pokopia.[9][7]

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem Hype Builds as Major 2026 Release
items.summary: Resident Evil Requiem, the highly anticipated survival-horror blockbuster from Capcom starring Leon S. Kennedy and Grace Ashcroft, set for February 27 release on Nintendo Switch 2 and other platforms, dominating week 9 anticipation.[1][2]

items.title: Fallout 4 Anniversary Edition Out Today on Switch 2
items.summary: Fallout 4: Anniversary Edition releases today, February 24, 2026, for Nintendo Switch 2, compiling the complete post-nuclear epic.[2]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
